text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 170 

GAP_MOPP_COPAY_1M 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy Copay for 1-month supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-payment amount for a 1-month supply of the drugs on this 
tier, using a mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the coverage gap phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_MOPP_COPAY_1M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8
